expectations.text: Explains terminal notification as a signal rather than a success/failure result
expectations.evidence: The answer broadens into generic task-event handling and does not cleanly define terminal notification as a bell/terminal-level signal.
Tells the reader to inspect the corresponding task window and recent output.

expectations.text: Avoids conflating terminal notification with unrelated event types
expectations.evidence: Mixes terminal notification with started/exited/waiting/disappeared instead of focusing on the specific notification asked about.
